form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Ballarat Bm74 December 6 over 1100m, soft track; 4 len behind Zouper Fund with 60.5kg at $3. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.2 len Corowa Cl3 November 3 over 1000m slow track defeating Taluk with 61.5kg at $1.70. This is an ideal race to kick off. Nice type who can take catching here.
